note: 3-class RF: ICMP Flood, SYN Flood, UDP Flood. SDN_DDOS_dataset.csv excluded (duplicate of individual CSVs). Unknown/zero-day attacks handled by confidence gate: if rf_conf < 0.55 → report as 'Uncertain'.
usage: import joblib; model=joblib.load('random_forest_sdn_final.pkl'); scaler=joblib.load('scaler.pkl'); le=joblib.load('label_encoder.pkl'); proba=model.predict_proba(scaler.transform(X)); pred=le.inverse_transform(proba.argmax(axis=1)); conf=proba.max(axis=1); final=[p if c>=0.55 else 'Uncertain' for p,c in zip(pred,conf)]
